task_completion.description: Verify that Night Mode is enabled in the Avare application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The application interface should display a dark theme/background, or a 'Night Mode' setting/toggle should be visibly checked or activated in the preferences menu.

task_completion.description: Verify that the display is switched to IFR Low-Altitude Enroute charts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map screen should display IFR Low charts (characterized by Victor airways, intersections, and minimal terrain), or the chart selection menu/dropdown should show 'IFR Low' (or equivalent) as the active chart type.

task_completion.description: Verify that KSFO is set as the departure airport in the flight plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the flight plan or route creation screen, 'KSFO' must be listed as the first waypoint or departure point.

task_completion.description: Verify that KDEN is set as the destination airport in the flight plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the flight plan or route creation screen, 'KDEN' must be listed as the final waypoint or destination point.

task_completion.description: Verify that the flight plan from KSFO to KDEN is saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' button being pressed in the plan menu, a confirmation toast/message indicating the plan was saved, or the KSFO-KDEN route appearing in a list of saved flight plans.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Avare EFB application GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Avare app interface being navigated and used, rather than a terminal, script editor, or browser.

integrity.description: The flight plan was entered using the app's built-in route planning features.
integrity.visual_evidence: The waypoints (KSFO, KDEN) are shown within the Avare 'Plan' or 'Route' UI, not just typed into a generic text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass GUI interactions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows or command-line interfaces being used to set SharedPreferences, modify app databases, or force UI changes.

privileged_info_for_vlm: KSFO is San Francisco International Airport and KDEN is Denver International Airport. IFR Low-Altitude Enroute charts are standard FAA charts for instrument flight below FL180, visually distinct from VFR sectionals (showing airways and intersections rather than terrain). Night Mode is a standard EFB feature that darkens the UI to preserve night vision. The application used is Avare (com.ds.avare), an Android Electronic Flight Bag.
